title: Delosperma harazianum
taxonomy: Delosperma harazianum is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Aizoaceae. It is a member of the genus Delosperma, which is a group of succulent plants native to southern Africa. The Delosperma harazianum is classified as a succulent, known for its small, delicate flowers and ability to store water in its leaves. This plant is often cultivated for its vibrant colors and hardiness in dry environments. It is also sometimes referred to as the "Rainbow Delosperma" due to its wide range of colors.
